title: Savory Jamaican Cheese Crumble
description: A light and savory dish featuring low-calorie-friendly cheese slices baked into a delicious crumble that can be enjoyed as a breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Jamaican sweet potato puree (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a touch of sweetness and extra nutrition.

ingredients.name: Low-fat cheese slices
ingredients.notes: Choose your favorite low-fat varieties such as mozzarella, cheddar, or feta.

instructions: In a pan over medium heat, add olive oil and sauté onions until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
If using sweet potato puree, mix it in with the onion mixture. Cook briefly until combined.
Lay cheese slices evenly on top of the cooked vegetables.
Bake in preheated oven for about 20 minutes or until cheese is golden and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
